name: Chocolate Frosting - Sugar Free
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend skim milk and vanilla together.
2. Add Dream Whip to the mixture and beat until stiff peaks form.
3. Gradually fold in sugar-free chocolate pudding mix until light and fluffy.
4. If the frosting is too thick, add more skim milk, a tablespoon at a time.
5. Use this frosting on low-fat cupcakes or to frost cakes or brownies. One tablespoon of frosting contains 9 calories and no cholesterol.
